title: callista reptans
intro: Callista reptans, also known as golden thread or creeping Jenny, is a flowering plant that belongs to the genus Lysimachia in the family Primulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as urinary tract infections and fever. The health benefits of Callista reptans include its ability to promote digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and support the immune system. Callista reptans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
